title: 2024 White House Easter Egg Roll in photos
shortDescription: First lady Jill Biden hosted the annual Easter Egg Roll on the South Lawn of the White House on Monday, April 1, 2024.

title: 40,000 people brave rain for largest ever White House Easter Egg Roll
shortDescription: The event on the White House South Lawn is one of the White House's oldest traditions that dates back to 1878.

title: White House Easter Egg Roll livestream: Watch annual festivities
shortDescription: The 2024 Easter "EGGucation" Roll at the White House will be split into nine sessions from 7 a.m. to 7 p.m. ET Monday.

title: Doctored video shows Trump vowing to free Imran Khan | Fact check

title: Biden's student loan forgiveness, SAVE plan face further legal action

title: Trump's New York fraud trial was civil, not criminal case | Fact check
shortDescription: The case is civil, not criminal, which means Trump was not facing charges. The post also oversimplifies the circumstances around the trial.

title: Bill for Malcolm X Day passes in Nebraska
